programme.title: Starksy 114
programme.desc: Starksy 114

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: Dr Robert Winchester is a brilliant researcher and a former test pilot who helped design Airwolf Now hes asking for Hawkes help in test flying a simulator that hes designed to enable the Firm to train future test pilots to fly Airwolf Reluctantly Hawke agrees but determines that the simulators feel is a little off Archangel convinces Hawke to let Winchester hook up the real Airwolf to his computers in order to get a more realistic demonstration This allows Winchester to engage in a little friendly flying competition with Hawke but it also allows the Russians to nearly get their hands on the high tech super copter

programme.title: Friday 13th the Series
programme.desc: Micki and Ryan search for a cursed scarecrow that may be responsible for murder

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Froy and Sonia repo from a stranded motorist who rallies the neighborhood around his cause and incites a full on revolt Ronnie and Carlos set out on their first unsupervised repo but their desire to impress is quickly derailed when an erratic debtor lets loose with pepper spray

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia and Carlos put their best performance in when they attempt to repossess a vehicle from a pair of silver-painted robot men Matt and Froy need a second opinion when they run into a debtor with a questionable claim about a life-threatening illness

programme.title: Shane
programme.desc: The story revolves around Shane a bounty hunter who helps a family of farmers being harassed by the local goons

programme.title: Public Cowboy Number 1
programme.desc: Rustlers using modern technology airplanes shortwave radios refrigerated trucks are Genes target

programme.title: Man of the Forest
programme.desc: The kidnapping of an heir to a ranch goes awry when the Man of the Forest mistrusted by the heiress takes matters into his own hands with the help of his pet cougar

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur gets help from Mister Ed to get more attention from Carol

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Carol decides to give her current beau the boot Ed defends a woman whose employer is suing her and Mike is humiliated when Dr Jerome second guesses him

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A strict new schoolmaster comes to teach - and he discovers to learn from Mark and Lucas

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A con man and his fast-gun friend come to North Fork Lucas enters a target shooting contest

programme.title: Gunsmoke S04E20 Love of a Good Woman
programme.desc: Gunsmoke S04E20 Love of a Good Woman

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Gunsmoke

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Bonanza

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: By order of President Grant Agents James West and Artemus Gordon must bring Russian prisoner Rimsky to Vladivostok Siberia in exchange for American Vice Consul Millard Boyer When he tries to escape Rimsky falls to his death forcing Gordon to disguise himself as Rimsky to complete the exchange The Russian contact arranging the exchange has West and Gordon imprisoned with the Vice Consul instead There they learn that Rimsky should have returned with 5 million dollars in extortion money from wealthy Russian immigrants Now the corrupt Russians are waiting for Rimsky and their cut of the ill-gotten treasure

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: fter work Joe Friday goes by a laundromat to buy cigarettes He interrupts a burglar stealing from the coin box and shots are fired The burglar dies and Friday is investigated by the shooting board to see if it is a justified shot

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A man is forcing different young women to help him rob banks and Friday and Gannon have to find out who he is and stop him

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: While working as a deck hand on a charter boat a company believes the skipper left the country after embezzling cash and securities The police decide to use an agent as the boats replacement skipper since the next passenger is the embezzlers wife who intends to meet up with him in Mexico The police also decide to investigate the mysterious deckhand since he has no background

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mike Nelson and three of his students search for a missing diver who was dragged deep below the surface by a large fish that he speared

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mike conducts an emergency covert search in foreign waters to recover a nuclear warhead ditched by a US Air Force plane A local fishing boat interferes

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Handsome ambitious greedy Jeff Boder and his wealthy older wife Jackie Winslows cynical stepdaughter Pamela become lovers and conspire to kill Jackie using cursed voodoo-like dolls

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Married sleazy advertising executive and music producer Bob Ames finds gorgeous seductive Cathie Marks hiding in his cabin in the woods during a rainstorm Is she a dream come true or something more sinister and dangerous

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks help from college professor Dr Victor Degoethels who has written a book about werewolves throughout the ages But Alamo Joe has already warned him about Eric and his crimes

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Tired and worn out Eric accepts the hospitality of an old man at his home in the woods He becomes attracted to a young woman named Margaret but he fears that he may be responsible for a series of brutal murders in the area

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick investigates the attack of a vampire novelist by one of her crazed fans

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: On Halloween night Micki and Ryan are visited by the ghost of their late uncle who has returned from the underworld

programme.title: Day of the Dead
programme.desc: Trapped in a missile silo a small team of scientists civilians and trigger-happy soldiers battle desperately to ensure the survival of the human race but tension inside the base is reaching breaking-point and the zombies are gathering outside

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: In this follow-up to the Prime Cut episode a group of recovering cannibals have a relapse and make the unfortunate decision to eat an intruder whos been contaminated with an alien disease

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: An Agatha Christie-style mystery sees the inhabitants of a remote hotel terrorized by rumors of a werewolf prowling the area Not to fear as a self-appointed werewolf hunter is amongst them But might he have a dark secret of his own

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A bitter elderly woman learns that her husband and a laid-back couple are hiding a youth potion from her while camping in the wilderness

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Smart is hypnotized to kill the Chief during their nightly game of chess

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max and Fang investigate an animal spa where other agents dogs killed them after visiting it

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: Pogo Lil is a female truck driver on the run from loan sharks She enters the Third annual Dixie crisscross race So she can win money to pay back the loan shark

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur gets help from Mister Ed to get more attention from Carol

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Carol decides to give her current beau the boot Ed defends a woman whose employer is suing her and Mike is humiliated when Dr Jerome second guesses him

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Col Hogan is less than thrilled when he is assigned to help an obnoxious American general flee Stalag 13 - and the secret plan involving a prisoner swap winds up as trying and difficult as the arrogant escapee himself

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: When the gangs hidden cache of money - needed to purchase a secret map - goes up in smoke the men of Stalag 13 must come up with a way to replace the cash - and decide to pull off a bank heist in the nearby town

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Binghamton makes Parker his personal aide in the hope of impressing Parkers Uncle - An Admiral on the Promotions Board But the Admiral is uncomfortable with the fact that his inept Nephew also functions as a Combat Officer and orders Parker to pack his bags for a safer position in The States He changes his mind however when he sees how dedicated McHale and the crew are to ENS Parker--after they put themselves at risk to rescue him in the Bay during an air raid

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: While searching McHales island for a stolen case of rare champagne Binghamton captures Fuji and places him under arrest as a spy McHale and The Crew must then concoct a complicated plan to free their Japanese friend which not only succeeds but winds up with an unexpected bonus

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Sergeant Carter takes a temporary desk job writing training manuals and considers making it permanent when he sees the platoon does fine without him; so Gomer messes things up to bring the Sergeant back

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer helps a recruit smuggle his girlfriend into the barracks

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Mr Howell names the other castaways as beneficiaries in his will But he then fears they may be trying to kill him for their inheritance when in reality they are throwing a surprise party for him

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan believes he has become an old man after his hair turns completely white overnight but The Professors solution only makes things worse when his hair completely falls out

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: After Grandpa tells Little Luke and his friends an exciting but untrue story about serving with Teddy Roosevelt in the Spanish-American War he is invited to appear as a guest of honor at a public Veterans Day celebration

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: An aging and nomadic Arapaho Indian Chief insists that he can repay the McCoys kindnesses by doing an extended sequence of dances that will bring much-needed rain

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Larry Darryl and Darryl ask Dick to represent them after theyre arrested for rustling a neighbors cow

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: In spite of Dicks objections Vermont Today turns into a confrontational exploitative talk show to boost its ratings

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: MacGillis father comes to visit but things are uneasy and it seems his father is always disappointed and putting him down Polly is asked to run for mayor

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The Pentagon is set to launch a new deadly missile that will destroy everything within 100 miles of its path and the island is ground zero

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Rene and RJ OGill two step-children of a recently widowed man hire Mitch to protect them for they suspect that their step-father Robert Houston murdered their mother for her money Both Rene and RJ will inherit a trust fund on Renes 25th birthday which is only a week away

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The team gets back to work but have their anger management sessions had any effect Sonia and Lyndah confront a gang of roller derby girls whove got the skills to protect their car

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Froy and Sonia repo from a stranded motorist who rallies the neighborhood around his cause and incites a full on revolt Ronnie and Carlos set out on their first unsupervised repo but their desire to impress is quickly derailed when an erratic debtor lets loose with pepper spray

programme.title: El Cid 1961 Charlton Heston Sophia Loren
programme.desc: El Cid 1961 Charlton Heston Sophia Loren

programme.title: The Mad Bomber
programme.desc: The Police Connection aka The Mad Bomber aka Detective Geronimo

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Using Jiridian technology scientists create a physical bio surrogates where a human consciousness can be transferred When a surrogate escapes they must find it before it uses its fighting and weapons knowledge

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Harrison and the team talk to a psychic woman who studied the aliens after the first invasion Meanwhile a group of aliens take over a family and travel cross country in order to awaken more aliens from hibernation

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A wealthy hunter stalks and wounds a rare hawk for a trophy Afterward the swamp takes Will into its confidence and Will sees the swamp as he never has before

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: The body of a dead man leads Swamp Thing to Arcane and Gen Sunderland

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: On the ice world of Ultima Thule the Alphans encounter members of lost earth expedition who have achieved immortality- but at a price!

programme.title: Conquest of the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Following a North American pandemic from a space-borne disease that wiped out all dogs and cats in 1983 the government has become a series of Schutzstaffel-patterned police states that took chimpanzees gorillas and orangutans as pets before establishing a culture based on ape slave labor These events were foretold in 1973 as testimony by two chimpanzee scientists who came from the distant future Cornelius and Zira before they were killed Widely believed to be dead their baby was secretly raised by the circus owner Armando as a young horseback rider In 1991 now fully grown and named Caesar the ape is brought to one of the cities to distribute flyers for Armandos circus During their trip Armando advises Caesar not to speak in public for fear of his life

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Daisy learns that Jessi Colter has recorded a song she wrote One problem Wheres the royalties shes due Thats what Bo and Luke try to find out as they infiltrate Hazzard County Commissioner Boss JD Hoggs record piracy operation

programme.title: Hercules 108
programme.desc: Hercules 108

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Alcoholic Off Joe Landers accidentally gets his partner killed and clumsily tries to cover it up as Stone and Keller work their way to the truth

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Jim Phelps is the new leader of the Impossible Missions Force with no explanation or even reference made about the departure of predecessor Dan Briggs First up for Phelps is a mission involving the drug trade Cresnik and Walters have cornered the heroin market and sell it at a handsome profit to gangs around the world Phelps devises an operation which will drive a wedge between the heroin dealers and their customers

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: An informant known as Black Ten turns Friday and Gannon onto a known burglar who is trying to sell an expensive ring that had been reported as stolen They enlist the aid of a policewoman just out of the academy to help them undercover

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: When a girl mysteriously disappears from school Friday and Gannon try to find her and they find out that there are more questions than answers One question is was she abducted by a man named Harper

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: After being on the run for 6 months Richard Kimble falls in love with a beautiful woman who has a young son She also has a physically abusive estranged husband that wants Kimble out of town or dead

programme.title: The Big Valley
programme.desc: Stern religious people lease a Barkley farm When townspeople discover the newcomers are Mormons who practice plural marriage they plan to drive them out Jarrod hides the truth as he attempts to mediate the situation

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne on an Army task is chased by the Sioux He wounds a miner so he stays to help the miner and his wife Three men wanted for selling faulty guns to the Sioux arrive with eyes for the wife and the gold although the Sioux threaten

programme.desc: The story of a US Naval ship and its crew in the Pacific from 1943 to 1945

programme.desc: In 1945 the fate of Viennas famous Lipizzaner stallions hangs into balance American general Patton could save them but first he asks to see them perform

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.desc: In 1944 a German sergeant gets involved in an anti-Hitler conspiracy and saves the life of an American colonel

programme.title: The Black Tent
programme.desc: In the African desert a British soldier romances the native chiefs daughter and helps the tribe fight off a Nazi attack

programme.title: The Flight Of The Phoenix
programme.desc: After an oil company plane crashes in the Sahara the survivors are buoyed with hope by one of the passengers an airplane designer who plans for them to build a flyable plane from the wreckage

programme.title: Woman Of Straw
programme.desc: Tyrannical but ailing tycoon Charles Richmond becomes very fond of his attractive Italian nurse Maria The nurse in turn falls in love with Charles neer-do-well nephew Anthony who plots ways to gain control of his uncles fortune

programme.desc: A group of young shopping mall employees stay behind for a late night party in one of the stores When the mall goes on lock-down before they can get out the robot security system malfunctions and goes on a killing spree

programme.desc: Two lovers stumble across a small American town where local children have killed the adult population in a bizarre ritual

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Hard Knocks 48 continues with some of the best fights in MMA! Mitch Carlson is welcomed back to HK cage by John "" The Dragon"" Nguyen in the amateur matchup of the night. Following are pros TJ Laramie, who prefers taking the fight standing, vs. Yvon ""Black Mamba"" Agenord, with a strong Jiu Jitsu background. This episode is rounded out by an entertaining pro contest between two MMA heavyweight veterans: Lee Mein vs. Lloyd Marshbanks.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Chris Smith v. Gareth Millar

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Hicham Achalhi v. Andre Schmeling

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: One of the most experienced fighters in the series, Nick Thompson has the scars to prove it. Ansar Chalangov will be looking to come out hard for the Russians.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in Hard Knocks' cage. Jerad Meyer v. Zach Snyder.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Mohammed Jaraya v. Redouan Laarkoubi

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Nick Agallar v. Nardu Debrah

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Athens, Greece on July 28, 2018, Karate Combat: Olympus is the second event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Held in the ancient Zappeion Courtyard where the first modern Olympic Games took place in 1896. On the Main Card: “Hurricane” Davy Dona of France versus Jerome “The Brown Bear” from the UK. The co-main event features Morocco’s Achraf Ouchen versus Ecuadorian Franklin Mina. Other fighters include Deivis Ferraras of Dominican Republic, Wellington Barbosa of Brazil, and Yaser Sahintekin of Turkey.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Rene Hoppe v. Ilya Bochkov

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Alex Lohore v. Tommy Gunn

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Abubakar Mestoev v. Anatoly Lyagu

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Modestas Bukauskas v. Kester Mamba

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ciaran Harrison v. Adeeb Islam

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Trenton Rowell trains out of two different gyms in his small town, perfecting his ground game at one and working his striking at the other. He loves MMA, and is always looking for new ways to grow his skills regardless of his results. Trenton epitomizes Process over Outcome in his training, as he never focuses on the title, but rather simply trying to be in the best shape possible while balancing work, MMA and family life.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Every athlete has their own unique way to be the best. We focus on the details of their training and why they think they have been successful. Gain insight on the featured athlete from their coaches and training partners - as well as the athlete themselves - about preparing for their sport. What do they bring to the sport as individuals - and what do they gain by being at the top of their game? Featuring Anton Tokarchuk

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Brett Caswell v. Josh Bangert

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Elhadji Ndour v. Calum Robb.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Amanda Buckner v. Shayna Baszler

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Main Event - Sheldon Gaines v. Nate Smandych

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in Hard Knocks' cage. Andy Jack v. Dillon Adam.

programme.desc: Join me as I celebrate a milestone in life as well as on the show Featuring special guests Felix Mcnulty Jennifer Santos and the beautiful Irina Voornina

programme.desc: Meet the man who created a 90s anthem that set the trend for Hip Hop Music today

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
